channel.title: EOLkits — AWS Deprecation Radar
channel.description: Every tracked AWS deprecation deadline — Lambda runtimes, Amazon Linux 2, IMDSv1 — with cited breaking changes and migration guides. Deterministic, sourced from primary AWS docs.

item.title: IMDSv1 Enforcement — deadline 2025-12-31
item.description: Deadline 2025-12-31 (high). IMDSv1 access will be blocked by default on new instance launches. Breaking changes: IMDSv1 requests fail; Must use IMDSv2 with session tokens; SSM agent must be updated. Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/UserGuide/configuring-instance-metadata-service.html

item.title: Lambda Node.js 20 Phase 1 — deadline 2026-04-30
item.description: Deadline 2026-04-30 (critical). Lambda functions using Node.js 20 runtime will fail to update. Phase 1: CreateFunction and UpdateFunctionConfiguration blocked. Breaking changes: CreateFunction and UpdateFunctionConfiguration API calls fail; aws-sdk v2 not available (use v3); OpenSSL 3 hash changes; URL vs require() for imports. Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lambda/latest/dg/lambda-runtimes.html

item.title: Amazon Linux 2 EOL — deadline 2026-06-30
item.description: Deadline 2026-06-30 (critical). Amazon Linux 2 reaches end of life. No more security patches, AMI publishing, or extras updates. Breaking changes: No security patches after EOL; yum replaced with dnf; amazon-linux-extras not available; ntpd replaced with chronyd; iptables replaced with nftables; Python 2 no longer available. Source: https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/aws/update-on-amazon-linux-2-end-of-life/

item.title: Lambda Python 3.9 EOL — deadline 2027-02-01
item.description: Deadline 2027-02-01 (high). Python 3.9 Lambda runtime (Amazon Linux 2) was deprecated on 2025-12-15 (no further security patches). Per the AWS Lambda runtime deprecation table, AWS blocks creating new python3.9 functions on 2027-02-01 and blocks updating existing ones on 2027-03-03. Functions keep running, but become unpatched and unmodifiable after the block dates. Breaking changes: distutils module removed; imp module removed; collections.Mapping deprecated; Native wheels may not be available. Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lambda/latest/dg/lambda-runtimes.html

item.title: Lambda Python 3.10 EOL — deadline 2027-04-30
item.description: Deadline 2027-04-30 (medium). Lambda functions using Python 3.10 runtime deprecated. Breaking changes: datetime.utcnow() deprecated; Various typing changes. Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lambda/latest/dg/lambda-runtimes.html

item.title: Lambda Python 3.11 EOL — deadline 2027-10-31
item.description: Deadline 2027-10-31 (low). Lambda functions using Python 3.11 runtime deprecated. Breaking changes: TOML parsing changes. Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lambda/latest/dg/lambda-runtimes.html
